summary: Comprehensive testing of ULN Enhanced Features - 5 major enhancements: Real blockchain integration, Live royalty analytics, ULN Analytics dashboard, Label onboarding workflow, Inter-label messaging. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components load correctly with all 9 tabs functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Blockchain service implements proper SHA-256 hash chains with proof-of-work mining (difficulty=2)
Smart contract deployment creates on-chain transaction records
Chain verification walks entire blockchain and validates hash integrity
Analytics service aggregates real royalty data from MongoDB with proper aggregation pipelines
Onboarding workflow properly tracks 5-step progress with session persistence
Messaging service supports thread creation, message sending, and read receipts
All endpoints properly use authentication via get_current_user/get_current_admin_user
Frontend components use proper data-testid attributes for testing
API calls use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL environment variable correctly

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 9 tabs load, all components render correctly)

seed_data_creation: Royalty data already seeded (955 entries per main agent context)
context_for_next_testing_agent: ULN Enhanced Features fully tested. Backend: All blockchain endpoints (stats, blocks, transactions, mine, verify, contracts/deploy, contracts list), all analytics endpoints (seed-royalties, cross-label-performance, revenue-trends, genre-breakdown, territory-breakdown, content-sharing, dao), all onboarding endpoints (start, step, complete), all messaging endpoints (threads create/list, messages send/get). Frontend: ULN page at /uln with 9 tabs - Overview, Labels, Content, Royalties, DAO Governance, Blockchain, Analytics, Register Label, Messages. Blockchain tab shows real blocks/transactions with mining capability. Analytics shows cross-label performance with real revenue data. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

blockchain.GET /api/uln-enhanced/blockchain/stats: PASS - Returns chain stats (blocks, transactions, pending, contracts)
blockchain.GET /api/uln-enhanced/blockchain/blocks: PASS - Returns blocks list with hash, previous_hash, nonce
blockchain.POST /api/uln-enhanced/blockchain/transa: PASS - Adds pending transaction with tx_hash
blockchain.POST /api/uln-enhanced/blockchain/mine: PASS - Mines pending transactions into new block

analytics.GET /api/uln-enhanced/analytics/cross-la: PASS - Returns label rankings with royalties

frontend.All 9 tabs present: PASS (overview, labels, content, royalties, dao, blockchain, analytics, onboarding, messaging)
frontend.Blockchain tab: PASS - Shows blocks, transactions, Mine Block btn, Verify Chain btn, Deploy Contract form
frontend.Analytics tab: PASS - Shows cross-label performance table with real revenue data
frontend.Register Label tab: PASS - Shows 5-step onboarding wizard with Begin Registration button
